parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: Selects the transform mode (ie. direction). Either DFT or IDFT.

parameters.name: coord
parameters.label: Coordinate System
parameters.description: Selects the coordinate system for output/input in the DFT/IDFT cases respectively.

parameters.name: chan
parameters.label: Channel
parameters.description: Selects which channel of the input to use for the discrete fourier transform.

parameters.name: transrows
parameters.label: Transform Rows
parameters.description: When enabled, will perform the DFT/IDFT by row.
